title: Junior Penetration Tester
description: We're hiring a Junior Penetration Tester at Splunk. This is an exciting opportunity to join our security-focused, data-obsessed, scale-oriented team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 1-3 years years of experience and are passionate about Observability, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Conduct authorized penetration tests to identify security vulnerabilities
Execute network scanning and enumeration to discover system weaknesses
Develop proofs-of-concept demonstrating impact of discovered vulnerabilities
Document findings in detailed reports with remediation recommendations
Communicate technical findings to non-technical stakeholders
Stay current with security tools and exploitation techniques through continuous learning

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or Cybersecurity

benefits: Flexible work schedule and remote work options
Wellness programs and gym membership reimbursement
